atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Injects Tailwind's base, components, and utilities styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inlines existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Defines custom CSS layers for organizing your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Specifies which Tailwind config file to use.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Adds custom variants to your CSS.
